name: Carrot Wheat Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the whole wheat flour, baking powder, all-purpose flour, brown sugar, cinnamon, and allspice.
2. In a small bowl, beat the egg with milk, molasses, and melted butter until well combined.
3. Stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients until just moistened.
4. Fold in the grated carrot, orange zest, chopped nuts, and raisins.
5. Fill greased muffin tins about 3/4 full with the batter.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
7. Makes 12 large muffins.
